subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! At every moment offer a hundred thousand thanksgivings at the Threshold of the one true God, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء در هر دمی صد هزار شکرانه بآستانه خداوند یگانه تقدیم نمائید که
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @fire and light; fire and water, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
